creator: jbo@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm not sure what to tell you... I quickly installed math/octave and math/octave-forge-control on a different machine (from the same poudriere repo tho) and it just worked out of the box.

Then I tested on my machine at home again (from which I initially created this PR), remove math/octave* and installed math/octave-forge-control and it just works here now too.

As of right now, I cannot reproduce this anymore. Things seem to work as intended after your patch :)

Thank you for having fixed this so quickly!
